{{Quote|Still, even if we fail to obtain the twins for our beloved Jedi Master, Major Himron's fingering of Mara Jade should succeed in neutralizing her as a threat to us.|[[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]], to [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]|<ref name="Last Command" />}}
[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Molo Himron''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served with the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He was also an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] operative. Himron was handpicked by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] himself for service in Intelligence for his skill, ruthlessness and calculating mind.<ref name="Last Command" />

==Biography==
====Early life====
Himron was considered the ideal Intelligence [[operative]], with no recognizable traits and his ability to blend into any environment. He survived more combat and "hard target" situations than any other operative, and was totally loyal to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="TTS" />

====Joining Thrawn====
He survived the fragmentation of the Empire and joined [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Thrawn's fleet (Galactic Empire)|forces]] around [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].<ref name="Last Command" />

====Mission to Coruscant====
Himron was assigned to the Imperial Army and was leader of an assault force sent to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Raid on Coruscant (Thrawn Crisis)|capture]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her [[Solo twins|children]].<ref name="Last Command" />

[[File:Electroniclockbreaker.jpg|thumb|220x220px|Himron, and another operative.]]
The assault failed thanks to [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]. Himron survived, though the [[Doctor/Legends|doctors]] in the Palace's medical wing were unsure if he would ultimately survive.<ref name="Last Command" />
